title: bufonia paniculata subsp. parviflora
intro: Bufonia paniculata subsp. parviflora is a subspecies of the Bufonia paniculata plant, also known as the rock jasmine or bufonia, which is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Plumbaginaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Bufonia paniculata subsp. parviflora include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and possessing antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
